roles.title: Head of Staking
roles.description: Lead staking infrastructure strategy and operations across Hashdex's crypto index products. Responsible for validator node management, staking yield optimization, and protocol research across major Proof-of-Stake networks. Drive product development for regulated crypto ETFs distributed in Brazil and internationally.

roles.title: Research Lead
roles.description: Led quantitative and qualitative research on Bitcoin, Ethereum, Layer-1 alternatives, DeFi, and NFTs to support product and investment decisions. Applied Python and SQL to retrieve and process on-chain and market data using Dune Analytics, Glassnode, and CryptoQuant.

roles.title: Research Analyst
roles.description: Performed in-depth market analysis of crypto assets to inform index construction and ETF product development. Provided technical research on staking mechanics including bonding/unbonding periods and sweeping cycles.

roles.title: Geophysicist
roles.description: Seismic data processing for Oil & Gas exploration projects targeting the Gulf of Mexico. Applied signal processing and wave propagation methods to subsurface imaging, drawing on the same mathematical frameworks studied in theoretical physics.
